<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# NGINX (HTTPS) — root-context

App at /, NGINX terminates TLS on https://localhost:9443/ and forwards over plain HTTP to the backend. SERVER_FORWARD_HEADERS_STRATEGY=NATIVE so Spring Boot honors X-Forwarded-Proto and Vaadin advertises wss:// for PUSH.

Proxy URL on `https://localhost:9443`: `/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

NGINX template (`nginx/https/root-context/default.conf.template`):

```nginx
# Mapping used to populate the 'Connection' header
# If $http_upgrade has a not blank value, then $connection_upgrade is set to 'upgrade',
# otherwise value will be 'close'
map $http_upgrade $connection_upgrade {
    default upgrade;
    '' close;
}

server {

    listen       443 ssl;
    server_name  localhost;

    ssl_certificate     /etc/nginx/tls/localhost.crt;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/nginx/tls/localhost.key;

    location ${VAADIN_PATH} {
        proxy_set_header        Host $host;
        proxy_set_header        X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        # $scheme is "https" because the listener above terminates TLS.
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_set_header        Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header        Connection $connection_upgrade;

        proxy_pass http://vaadin:8080${VAADIN_PATH};
        proxy_redirect $scheme://$host${VAADIN_PATH} $scheme://$http_host${VAADIN_PATH};

        # Can be tuned if the Vaadin PUSH websocket gets closed unexpectedly
        # proxy_read_timeout 90
    }
}
```
